_README:
Manual no-program overrides. Final word for cases where the automated pipeline (Wikipedia in sponsoredPrograms.json + AI verification in programVerifications.json) is wrong. The matcher consults this file BEFORE Wikipedia and AI verification — entries here always win.

Format: '<schoolId>:<gender>': true (school does NOT field a varsity program of this gender — drop it from results). Add a sibling '_reason_<schoolId>:<gender>' key with a one-line explanation for future maintainers.

To VET an entry: run `npx tsx server/scripts/auditOverrides.ts`. The audit reports whether each entry is redundant (already handled by Wikipedia/AI) or load-bearing.

Most SEC/Big-12/Big-Ten football schools without men's varsity soccer were already covered by Phase 1 (Wikipedia) and Phase 2 (AI verification). The 7 entries below are the safety net for cases where the schoolId in our schools.json doesn't match either Wikipedia's or the scraper's data. Future scraper false positives that slip through Phases 1 + 2 should be added here.
_reason_ole-miss:mens: SEC — no men's varsity soccer. Schools.json has no entry under 'ole-miss', but kept defensively in case it's added later.
